final:
module top_module(
  input             clk,
  input             rst,
  input      [15:0] val_a,
  input      [15:0] val_b,
  output reg [31:0] result
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
  if(rst)
    result <= 0;
  else
    result <= val_a + val_b;
end

endmodule
